---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Description

A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. What are you trying to accomplish that the current tools do not support?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible about what the feature would do and how it would work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered. Why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or references that help explain the feature request.
